title: Intense Charred Irish Lamb Wrap
description: A charred and velvety Irish dish featuring cranberry and wrapped in a pandan leaf, perfect for a date night.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb shoulder with garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over high heat and sear the lamb shoulder until charred on all sides.
Transfer the lamb shoulder to the oven and roast for 20 minutes per pound, or until the internal temperature reaches 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
While the lamb is cooking, prepare the cranberry sauce by mixing it with dried cranberries.
Once the lamb is cooked, let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing it thinly.
To assemble the wrap, lay a pandan leaf flat and spread a layer of cranberry sauce in the center.
Add sliced lamb on top of the cranberry sauce and fold the pandan leaf to enclose.
